This is a governed remote MCP discovery surface, not a baseline-managed deployment.
Remote MCP remains interoperable and approval-bound rather than authoritative baseline state.
selection_posture=discover-on-demand
Baseline uses a local manifest-backed interoperability plane and does not require a hosted MCP deployment.
Servers in this catalog define reusable interoperability posture, not specialization semantics.
